---
title: "Smart table RevealJS fixtures"
format:
  revealjs:
    auto-stretch: false
filters:
  - quarto
  - ../../_extensions/smart-typst-tables/smart-typst-tables.lua
smart-tables:
  revealjs:
    max-width: 100%
    max-height: 60vh
    overflow: auto
    font-size: auto
---

## Standalone

| Team | Monthly amount | Long explanation |
|---|---:|---|
| Data | 1 234,50 € | A deliberately longer value that should wrap in a presentation. |

## Columns

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}
| Team | Rate | Notes |
|---|---:|---|
| Data | 91,0 % | [Linked detail](https://example.com) with `code`. |
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
- Supporting point
- Another point
:::

:::

## Long headers use a planned minimum

::: {#tbl-reveal-wide smart-tables-width="full" smart-tables-header-lines="2"}

| Workstream | Start date | Review date | Planned hours | On-time rate | Follow-up notes |
|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|
| Discovery | 2026-01-06 | 2026-01-20 | 80 | 91,0 % | Stable delivery with a few integration delays. |
| Prototype | 2026-01-21 | 2026-02-18 | 160 | 88,5 % | Batch validation adds some review time. |

:::

## Explicit widths remain author-controlled

::: {#tbl-reveal-explicit tbl-colwidths="[20,25,55]"}

| Team | Budget | Detailed observation |
|---|---:|---|
| Design | 9 750 € | The authored width must not gain an inferred Reveal minimum. |

:::

## Native merged cells remain legible

::: {.list-table #tbl-reveal-spans header-rows=2 header-cols=1 aligns="l,c,r"}

- - Team
  - []{colspan=2}Current period
- - Group
  - Rate
  - Amount
- - Data
  - []{rowspan=2}91,0 %
  - 1 234,50 €
- - Design
  - [View detail](https://example.com)

:::

## Dense data remains compact

::: {#tbl-reveal-dense}

| Region | Segment | Code | Date | Duration | Budget | Rate | Status | Owner | Detail |
|---|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---|---|---|
| East | Student | E-102 | 12/06/2026 | 1 h 30 | 12 500 € | 91,0 % | Active | Anaïs | A long note may wrap, while compact fields remain close to their content. |

:::

## Scrollable {.scrollable}

::: {.callout-note}
| Header one | Header two |
|---|---|
| `complex` content | $x^2$ remains intact |
:::
